name: Doggy Bank
overview: When a broke dimwitted slacker is hired by a mad philosopher to babysit his pampered pooch, he's thrown into a world of bizarre incidents and off-kilter life lessons that could turn his dead-end existence around.

trailers.title: New Comedy Series - Doggy Bank -Trailer - Who let the dogs out?
